codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocker. `mini/lib/manual-upload-preflight.js` now derives the local-only WeChat paths from the checked-in runtime boundary, inspects the git index with `git ls-files --cached`, and reports tracked/staged private-artifact failures separately from ignore-rule checks; `mini/tests/release-preflight.test.mjs` adds regressions for `mini/project.private.config.json`, `mini/config/runtime.local.js`, and `mini/upload-secrets/code-upload.private.key`. I did not find any new blocking problems in the touched preflight path.

summary: Pass. The original failure is resolved: manual-upload preflight now fails closed when operator-private WeChat artifacts are already tracked or staged, while preserving the prior handoff and release-honesty behavior. No new blocking issues were identified in the fix diff or transcript skeleton.
